will called this extravagant dish this definitely common dish that will find your local Chinese takeaway other typical Chinese restaurant that matter.

these might sounds exotic western world were absolutely vital creating wonderful arrays simple home cooked dishes.
This fine example such dish.
noteworthy this dish though technique that commonly used Chinese cooking provide meat with smooth, tender velvety texture known 'velveting'.
This crucial step many delectable Oriental stir dishes.
bonafide Chinese cook would ever dared skip this fear delivering insipid meat, especially when whole success dish relies heavily finishing texture.
true spirits would have cooked this dish, faithfully stay true method.
Soaked wood mushroom tiger lily buds warm water minutes, until soften.
wood mushroom will double size tiger lily buds will plump
Drain both squeeze excess water.
mushroom into smaller pieces aside along with tiger lily buds.
Combine chicken with marinade large bowl, thoroughly leave marinate least minutes.
After this time, heat over high heat until smoking.
chicken toss seconds, until chicken began turn white colour.
This called 'velveting' process.
Remove chicken drain some kitchen towel.
Pour away tablespoon return back onto heat.
When smoking, garlic stir seconds, until fragrant chicken along with wood mushroom tiger lily buds stir another minute.
oyster sauce water bring boil.
Cooked further minutes, until chicken cooked through.
cornflour mixture stir well into sauce, should thicken almost immediately.
Season with black pepper finish with sesame oil, stir well immediately remove from heat.
Transfer clean serving dish, garnish with spring onions served with some steamed rice.

Carl Franz Bally born Schonenwed, Switzerland 1821.
silk ribbon weaver, together with brother taken over family business 1847.
Carl Franz expanded company include elastic tape that used shoemakers.
While business trip Paris 1850, Bally fascinated pair subtly decorated slippers found wife.
bought several pairs different styles later started manufacture collections factory.
1951 together with brother Carl founded "Bally&Co", hiring German shoemaker, worked basement home.
Initially shoes were entirely handmade, manufacturing process based division labor.
Just years after shoe production started 1854 factory built centre village later when brother Fritz left business Carl Franz Bally founds company "C.F.Bally".
Shortly first shops were opened Bern, Basle Zurich exports South America began.
1868 elastic ribbon factory build Bally.
required construction water channel power water-driven turbine MacKay sole sewing machine.
This start mechanization production process, which almost entirely mechanized 1870s, with latest advances technology from USA, introduced factory Franz's Edward after trips these countries.
Thanks quality material, excellent finish refined decoration Bally shoes century stood luxury company occupying leading position Europe.
agencies were opened Barcelona, Cairo, Vienna, Hamburg, Lisbon, Marseille Sofia.
1881 first Bally shop opened London's most fashionable street Bond Street.
years later, 1892 Carl Franz Bally handed company over sons.
"C.F.
Bally Sons" entering last decade 19th century with millions pairs shoes produced annually.
Carl Franz Bally founder company died 1898 continued business.
Economic boom 1900s free trade helped company build important markets France, Germany, Austria Italy.
1907 Bally went public, with majority shares owned family members.
company continued grow.
Building tanneries, shoe factories stores.
Even First World affect Bally, supplying military shoes French, German Swiss armies.
twenties C.F.
Bally established holding company with five separate divisions retail, wholesale, production, tannery real estate.
Later retail company Bally Arola founded separate entity.
Bally survived world depression WWII restrictions limitations using different materials like rubber, cork, wood straw later diversifying production include shoes every occasion: work, leisure sport.
boom years Bally rapidly expanding could only satisfy demand spreading operations South Africa, Brazil Belgium.
Further diversification into several industries specialized rubber, glues other chemicals result market saturation cheap imports exports decline.
1976 Bally adds handbags other leather accessories shoe line.
Successfully growing through difficult 80s, when Bally product compromised because improper distribution quality problems, caused inappropriate licensing, Bally regains global luxury brand image 90s.
1999 Bally sold Texas Pacific Group, which launched strategy reposition company.
150th anniversary, which celebrated company 2001, Bally leaders world luxury market, with stores being opened China, Saudi Arabia, Lebanon, Turkey, Nepal, Brazil, Hungary, Hong Kong, Japan, Australia Russia.
show room open European fashion capital Milan 2003 convenience press buyers during fashion weeks presentation collections.
Today Bally prides itself about mono-brand stores around globe plans ahead with shops opening Sydney, Shanghai, Taipei, Dusseldorf Beverly Hills.
love shoes have Bally family begin collecting shoes back 19th century passion, which resulted setting Bally Shoe Museum Schonenwerd, Switzerland, where they have gathered most extensive collection historical boots shoes ever seen under roof.
